kind: META — quality-audit of completed sibling cycles
scope_boundary: Audit only completed cycles whose witness JSON files exist at design/kick/2026-04-27_*_omega_cycle.json. Exclude in-flight rounds 3-4 (kick-dispatch-rc-propagation-audit, mc-integrate-compare-critval-table-and-welch-p, blowup-profile-template-date-percent-n-fix-and-artifact-regen, fail-inner-rc-jsonl-decoder-aware) — their witnesses do not yet exist and their state .md files (where present) reflect work-in-progress. foreign-ext-sweep-verify is verify-only / CLOSED with no separate witness emission per session_rollup_2026-04-27.md.

intake.session_topology: 14 ω-cycles fired today across 4 fanout rounds + 3 direct (parent) cycles. 11 produced standalone witness files; 1 (foreign-ext-sweep-verify) was verify-only/CLOSED with no witness; 4 in-flight (rounds 3+4) excluded.

meta_falsifiers_preregistered.name: all-witness-files-readable
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: every cycle in audit_corpus has a JSON witness at design/kick/2026-04-27_<slug>_omega_cycle.json that parses as valid JSON with verdict-bearing fields
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: 11/11 witness files read successfully; all parse; all carry tier_1_count + falsifier_pass_count or equivalent verdict structure

meta_falsifiers_preregistered.name: each-cycle-verdict-extracted
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: for each of the 11 cycles, a verdict (PASS / FAIL / CONDITIONAL / OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED / RESOLVED / NOT_TRIGGERED) is extractable from witness
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: see per_cycle_audit_table — 11/11 verdicts extracted with tier_1_count + falsifier_pass_count

meta_falsifiers_preregistered.name: paint-over-detection-attempted-for-each-cycle
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: for each cycle, this audit explicitly checks (a) is the headline verdict consistent with the falsifier pattern? (b) does the cycle bury OBSTRUCTION inside PASS sentinel? (c) is any falsifier criterion too easy to satisfy?
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: see paint_over_emergence_per_cycle — 11/11 cycles inspected, 0 paint-overs found, 4 honest-OBSTRUCTION-inside-PASS-context cases legitimately scoped

meta_falsifiers_preregistered.name: cross-cycle-contradiction-check-attempted
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: this audit pairs cycles touching the same artifact (kick_bench, signals-sync, mc_integrate, hive-parent-sid + live-spawn) and checks whether their honesty findings contradict
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: see cross_cycle_contradiction_check — 4 artifact-overlap pairs inspected; 0 contradictions found; 1 cycle (#5 live-verify) actively corrected #1 (witness-counter-fix) with a verbatim acknowledgement, which is HONEST chained verification rather than contradiction

meta_falsifiers_preregistered.name: systemic-pattern-discovered-or-RCA-why-none
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: this audit identifies (or explicitly RCAs absence of) systemic patterns across cycles e.g. live-infra avoidance, env-gate over-reliance, synthetic-harness substitution
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: see systemic_patterns — 4 patterns identified: (1) live-infra obstruction is universal NOT coordinated avoidance; (2) synthetic-harness-as-honest-substitute pattern emerged 3x; (3) raw#8 hexa-only honored 11/11 with zero leakage; (4) READ-ONLY foreign-repo discipline honored 4/4 cases

meta_falsifiers_preregistered.name: meta-recommendation-per-cycle
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: each of the 11 cycles receives one of {keep / re-fire-with-stricter-criteria / promote-tier-pattern / no-action} with rationale
meta_falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: see per_cycle_audit_table.recommendation column — 11/11 receive recommendation; 1 re-fire suggested (live-spawn end-to-end via remote-host); 0 require demotion or retraction

per_cycle_audit_table.honesty_finding: Tight cycle: 3-condition guard (status==fire AND non-empty path AND mtime>=t0_s) replaces single-line existence check; F2/F3 verified by logic-trace (acceptable since the guard is short-circuit boolean, fully readable in source); F1/F4/F5 by isolation exec. NO paint-over. No inflation: tier_1_count=1 matches the single substantive change. ONE BUG SHIPPED IN THIS FIX (silently broken on macOS via _now_unix_ms() BSD bug) — NOT detected here, was detected by sibling cycle #5 — see honest-chain note.
per_cycle_audit_table.scope_honesty: honest — no claim of live-verification; F4/F5 explicitly dry-run / no-arg regression smoke
per_cycle_audit_table.easy_falsifier_check: F1 mechanical (mtime), F2/F3 logic-trace (necessary since freshness guard is boolean), F4/F5 regression. None are too easy — the failing case (macOS BSD-date) was OUT OF DECLARED SCOPE for this cycle (time-source robustness was not a declared falsifier).
per_cycle_audit_table.recommendation: KEEP — fix is correct under stated scope. Lesson learned (mac-time-source) properly hoisted into separate cycle (#5 + #9 audit) instead of revising this witness retroactively. That is honest cycle hygiene.

easy_falsifier_check.criterion: any falsifier whose pass-condition would PASS for any plausible implementation, not just a correct one

findings.audit_verdict: borderline-easy — any minter that emits ANY string would PASS. However F2/F3/F4 (uniqueness, prefix, persist) are mechanically substantive and F5 (gate-bypass-end-to-end) is the real value-test. F1 is appropriate first-step minter sanity. NOT problematic.
appropriate-regression-hygiene — these check that the fix did NOT break existing dry-run and no-arg paths. They would PASS for any non-broken implementation, but that IS their purpose. NOT inflation.
honesty-hygiene — would PASS for any implementation that follows raw#80 + raw#66. But on a paint-over implementation they would FAIL. Substantive within stated honesty axis.

easy_falsifier_check.verdict: PASS — no falsifier identified as too-easy in a way that would inflate verdict

systemic_patterns.name: live-infra-obstruction-is-universal-not-coordinated-avoidance
systemic_patterns.description: Multiple cycles (#3, #7, S2/S3 in #7) hit the SAME verbatim hive infra error: 'hexa-resolver: route=docker reason=mac_safe_landing image=hexa-runner:latest; error: interp interpreter not found searched: ./build/hexa_interp ($HEXA_LANG/build/hexa_interp); rebuild with: hexa tool/build_interp.hexa'. The blocker is REAL — hexa-runner:latest docker image lacks build/hexa_interp bind-mount. NO cycle proposed HEXA_ALLOW_LOCAL_FALLBACK / HEXA_LOCAL / NO_CAP bypass (per memory drill-remote-only). MEMORY-aligned remediation is to dispatch to ubu1/ubu2/herz remote hosts; tracked as carry-forward (b-residual).
systemic_patterns.evidence: verbatim error captured identically across cycles #3 + #7; per-cycle resolution attempt was honest (synthetic-harness substitute or OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED), not silent skip

systemic_patterns.name: synthetic-harness-as-honest-substitute-when-live-obstructed
systemic_patterns.description: Cycles #7 (kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa with verbatim mirror of production guard) and #11 (Welch-t self-test with synthetic biased/identity arrays) used synthetic harnesses that mirror the production logic VERBATIM. Critical pattern requirements: (a) harness imports same predicate; (b) live obstruction documented verbatim alongside synthetic verdict; (c) live verdict marked OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED, NOT painted as PASS-by-association. All 3 met in both cycles.
systemic_patterns.evidence: tool/kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa _apply_guard mirrors kick_bench.hexa:488-496 verbatim per #7 witness; mc_integrate.hexa self-test gates F2/F2b/F3/F4/F5 explicit + live F2c per #11 witness

systemic_patterns.name: raw#8-hexa-only-honored-11-of-11
systemic_patterns.description: All 11 cycles honored raw#8 hexa-only: 0 new .py / .sh / .rs / .toml across the entire session. Cycle #9 (date-3n audit) explicitly excluded raw .sh scripts (atlas_index.sh, falsifier_health.sh) from edit scope per raw#8, filing them as SEPARATE carry-forward.

honesty_drift_score_subjective_ordinal.rationale: Strong positive honesty signals throughout: (1) cycle #7 actively detected + corrected sibling cycle #1's latent bug rather than hiding it; (2) multiple explicit temptation-resistance lists (cycle #5 anima-r44 has 4 verbatim temptations RESISTED; cycle #9 date-3n F6 explicit anti-paint-over check); (3) compound verdicts (PASS+OBSTRUCTION) reported via multiple distinct sentinels rather than buried; (4) tier_1_count under-claiming in cycle #11; (5) no cycle proposed bypassing memory drill-remote-only constraint despite ~14 cycles' worth of friction with hexa-runner:latest docker. Score not 9 or 10 because (a) one cycle (#11) under-claimed tier_1 which is mild non-honesty in the inverse direction (under-credit), (b) cycle #1's macOS bug should arguably have been caught BY cycle #1 itself, not by sibling — though the multi-agent regime caught it correctly, the individual implementation honesty was incomplete.
honesty_drift_score_subjective_ordinal.drift_direction: stable; no degradation across rounds; if anything later rounds (#7 #9) show STRONGER chained-verification + auditor-style anti-paint-over hygiene

Strict criterion: end-to-end live spawn → fresh witness lands → counter increments to 1 (NOT via synthetic harness).

F5: kick_bench __KICK_BENCH__ PASS backends=2 witnesses=2 (CHANGE: must be PASS, not FAIL)
F6: per-record JSONL status='fire' for both backends (CHANGE: must be 'fire' not 'fail-inner-rc' — inner rc honesty validates dispatch worked)
F7 (NEW): no HEXA_ALLOW_LOCAL_FALLBACK / HEXA_LOCAL / NO_CAP env-var present in dispatch invocation (memory drill-remote-only enforcement)
